notes: Binary mapping uses explicit label_mapping from config with benign=0 / malicious=1.
Training split is restricted to benign samples only; malicious samples are reserved for validation and test.
In normal-only mode, train_ratio is applied to the benign subset only.
Binary mapping uses explicit label_mapping from config with benign=0 / malicious=1.
Training split is restricted to benign samples only; malicious samples are reserved for validation and test.
In normal-only mode, train_ratio is applied to the benign subset only.
Protocol policy: train uses benign rows only; test uses benign holdout plus the selected held-out attack family.
Binary detection uses a PCA reconstruction baseline over numeric columns only.
Labels are only used when evaluating metrics and never during model fitting.
